title: Datagrok domain schema manifest
description: Declares entity-mapped tables of a plugin database schema (databases/<schema>/schema.json). Tables get platform row/column security, Datlas-managed CRUD, and an in-transaction audit trail.

name.description: Logical schema name; must match the databases/<name>/ directory.

version.description: Manifest version (semver recommended). Recorded in the registry on deploy.

tables.description: Entity-mapped tables keyed by table name.

propertySchemas.description: Named groups of dynamic (jsonb) properties; grant a schema to a group to control column visibility.

migrations.description: Explicit statements for destructive changes the diff engine refuses to apply automatically.

securityMode.description: table: one check against the table entity; master: delegate to the master row via the delegate column; row: per-row grants with lazy/eager promotion.

promotion.description: Row mode only. lazy: entities row created on first share; eager: at insert.

defaultRowVisibility.description: Row/master modes: whether table-level View shows unshared rows.

delegate.description: Master mode: the ref column whose target row's security applies.

audit.description: Per-table in-transaction audit trail (before/after diffs, history, restore).

idempotency.description: Adds the idempotency_key system column for replay-safe creates.

ginIndex.description: Adds a GIN (jsonb_path_ops) index on the data column.

businessKey.description: Natural key: powers dedup-on-insert, upsert matching, and entity handles.

columns.description: Relational columns keyed by column name. System columns (id, is_deleted, version, created_on, updated_on, author_id, idempotency_key, data) are generated and must not be declared.

schemas.description: Property schemas contributing jsonb keys to this table.

type.description: Property type; ref = FK to another table in this manifest; user/group = FK to the core users/groups tables with the matching semantic type.

isName.description: Marks this column as the primary display name for rows of this table (max one per table; string columns only). Fallback: a string column named 'name'.

ref.description: Target table name (type = ref only). Cross-plugin refs are not allowed.

onDelete.description: Engine-enforced referential action on soft delete (ref/user/group columns).

default.description: Default value for new rows / UI inputs.
